summary: Made two surgical continuity edits: one to clarify that Chapter 13 is a return trip after the prior shore drive, and one to aim the closing beat more cleanly toward the ride back out of the trailer park.
edits: Changed the early drive reference to 'back down' so the opening reads as a return to the shore after the previous chapter's trip home.
Adjusted the final sentence to anchor Lena in the passenger seat for the ride back, strengthening the exit handoff without changing the chapter's emotional turn.
